data.name: Interactive Sex - Futanari BDSM
data.detailed_description:
A simple interactive sex game with juicy animations and graphics.

Choose from various Futanari BDSM sex acts and positions to make the girl cum while watching out for your stamina.

GAME DESCRIPTION

You play as a dominant Futanari character in BDSM sex acts with a hot girl.
Follow the 2 sliders and keep the sex going by pressing SPACE at the right time, to avoid the arousal level to drop or your stamina to run out, and lose the game.
Go through various sex styles and positions, to avoid the arousal level to stop increasing.

All this, in high quality, realistic animations and renderings.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and rederings.
- HD renders and animations.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
